# mailu_domain_manager (Resource)

Manages a Mailu domain manager assignment.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mailu_domain_manager" "admin" {
  domain     = "example.com"
  user_email = "admin@example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String)
- `user_email` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
